verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce Dominus dissipabit terram :  et nudabit eam, et affliget faciem ejus,  et disperget habitatores ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֧ה יְהֹוָ֛ה בּוֹקֵ֥ק הָאָ֖רֶץ וּבֽוֹלְקָ֑הּ וְעִוָּ֣ה פָנֶ֔יהָ וְהֵפִ֖יץ יֹשְׁבֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: Behold, the Lord maketh the earth empty, and maketh it waste, and turneth it upside down, and scattereth abroad the inhabitants thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit sicut populus, sic sacerdos ;  et sicut servus, sic dominus ejus ;  sicut ancilla, sic domina ejus ;  sicut emens, sic ille qui vendit ;  sicut fœnerator, sic is qui mutuum accipit ;  sicut qui repetit, sic qui debet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֤ה כָעָם֙ כַּכֹּהֵ֔ן כַּעֶ֙בֶד֙ כַּֽאדֹנָ֔יו כַּשִּׁפְחָ֖ה כַּגְּבִרְתָּ֑הּ כַּקּוֹנֶה֙ כַּמּוֹכֵ֔ר כַּמַּלְוֶה֙ כַּלֹּוֶ֔ה כַּנֹּשֶׁ֕ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֖ר נֹשֶׁ֥א בֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And it shall be, as with the people, so with the priest; as with the servant, so with his master; as with the maid, so with her mistress; as with the buyer, so with the seller; as with the lender, so with the borrower; as with the taker of usury, so with the giver of usury to him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dissipatione dissipabitur terra, et direptione prædabitur ;  Dominus enim locutus est verbum hoc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִבּ֧וֹק ׀ תִּבּ֛וֹק הָאָ֖רֶץ וְהִבּ֣וֹז ׀ תִּבֹּ֑ז כִּ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה דִּבֶּ֖ר אֶת־הַדָּבָ֥ר הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.king_james: The land shall be utterly emptied, and utterly spoiled: for the Lord hath spoken this word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Luxit, et defluxit terra, et infirmata est ;  defluxit orbis,  infirmata est altitudo populi terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָבְלָ֤ה נָֽבְלָה֙ הָאָ֔רֶץ אֻמְלְלָ֥ה נָבְלָ֖ה תֵּבֵ֑ל אֻמְלָ֖לוּ מְר֥וֹם עַם־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: The earth mourneth and fadeth away, the world languisheth and fadeth away, the haughty people of the earth do languish.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et terra infecta est ab habitatoribus suis,  quia transgressi sunt leges,  mutaverunt jus,  dissipaverunt fœdus sempiternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָאָ֥רֶץ חָנְפָ֖ה תַּ֣חַת יֹשְׁבֶ֑יהָ כִּֽי־עָבְר֤וּ תוֹרֹת֙ חָ֣לְפוּ חֹ֔ק הֵפֵ֖רוּ בְּרִ֥ית עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: The earth also is defiled under the inhabitants thereof; because they have transgressed the laws, changed the ordinance, broken the everlasting covenant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc maledictio vorabit terram,  et peccabunt habitatores ejus ;  ideoque insanient cultores ejus,  et relinquentur homines pauci.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֗ן אָלָה֙ אָ֣כְלָה אֶ֔רֶץ וַֽיֶּאְשְׁמ֖וּ יֹ֣שְׁבֵי בָ֑הּ עַל־כֵּ֗ן חָרוּ֙ יֹ֣שְׁבֵי אֶ֔רֶץ וְנִשְׁאַ֥ר אֱנ֖וֹשׁ מִזְעָֽר׃
verses.king_james: Therefore hath the curse devoured the earth, and they that dwell therein are desolate: therefore the inhabitants of the earth are burned, and few men left.

verses.latin_vulgate: Luxit vindemia, infirmata est vitis,  ingemuerunt omnes qui lætabantur corde ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָבַ֥ל תִּיר֖וֹשׁ אֻמְלְלָה־גָ֑פֶן נֶאֶנְח֖וּ כׇּל־שִׂמְחֵי־לֵֽב׃
verses.king_james: The new wine mourneth, the vine languisheth, all the merryhearted do sigh.

verses.latin_vulgate: cessavit gaudium tympanorum,  quievit sonitus lætantium,  conticuit dulcedo citharæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁבַת֙ מְשׂ֣וֹשׂ תֻּפִּ֔ים חָדַ֖ל שְׁא֣וֹן עַלִּיזִ֑ים שָׁבַ֖ת מְשׂ֥וֹשׂ כִּנּֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: The mirth of tabrets ceaseth, the noise of them that rejoice endeth, the joy of the harp ceaseth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum cantico non bibent vinum ;  amara erit potio bibentibus illam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּשִּׁ֖יר לֹ֣א יִשְׁתּוּ־יָ֑יִן יֵמַ֥ר שֵׁכָ֖ר לְשֹׁתָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: They shall not drink wine with a song; strong drink shall be bitter to them that drink it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Attrita est civitas vanitatis,  clausa est omnis domus, nullo introëunte.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִשְׁבְּרָ֖ה קִרְיַת־תֹּ֑הוּ סֻגַּ֥ר כׇּל־בַּ֖יִת מִבּֽוֹא׃
verses.king_james: The city of confusion is broken down: every house is shut up, that no man may come in.

verses.latin_vulgate: Clamor erit super vino in plateis,  deserta est omnia lætitia,  translatum est gaudium terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צְוָחָ֥ה עַל־הַיַּ֖יִן בַּחוּצ֑וֹת עָֽרְבָה֙ כׇּל־שִׂמְחָ֔ה גָּלָ֖ה מְשׂ֥וֹשׂ הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: There is a crying for wine in the streets; all joy is darkened, the mirth of the land is gone.

verses.latin_vulgate: Relicta est in urbe solitudo,  et calamitas opprimet portas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִשְׁאַ֥ר בָּעִ֖יר שַׁמָּ֑ה וּשְׁאִיָּ֖ה יֻכַּת־שָֽׁעַר׃
verses.king_james: In the city is left desolation, and the gate is smitten with destruction.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia hæc erunt in medio terræ  in medio populorum,  quomodo si paucæ olivæ quæ remanserunt  excutiantur ex olea et racemi,  cum fuerit finita vindemia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י כֹ֥ה יִֽהְיֶ֛ה בְּקֶ֥רֶב הָאָ֖רֶץ בְּת֣וֹךְ הָעַמִּ֑ים כְּנֹ֣קֶף זַ֔יִת כְּעוֹלֵלֹ֖ת אִם־כָּלָ֥ה בָצִֽיר׃
verses.king_james: When thus it shall be in the midst of the land among the people, there shall be as the shaking of an olive tree, and as the gleaning grapes when the vintage is done.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi levabunt vocem suam, atque laudabunt :  cum glorificatus fuerit Dominus, hinnient de mari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵ֛מָּה יִשְׂא֥וּ קוֹלָ֖ם יָרֹ֑נּוּ בִּגְא֣וֹן יְהֹוָ֔ה צָהֲל֖וּ מִיָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: They shall lift up their voice, they shall sing for the majesty of the Lord, they shall cry aloud from the sea.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc in doctrinis glorificate Dominum ;  in insulis maris  nomen Domini Dei Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֥ן בָּאֻרִ֖ים כַּבְּד֣וּ יְהֹוָ֑ה בְּאִיֵּ֣י הַיָּ֔ם שֵׁ֥ם יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Wherefore glorify ye the Lord in the fires, even the name of the Lord God of Israel in the isles of the sea.

verses.latin_vulgate: A finibus terræ laudes audivimus,  gloriam Justi.  Et dixi : Secretum meum mihi,  secretum meum mihi.  Væ mihi !  prævaricantes prævaricati sunt,  et prævaricatione transgressorum prævaricati sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִכְּנַ֨ף הָאָ֜רֶץ זְמִרֹ֤ת שָׁמַ֙עְנוּ֙ צְבִ֣י לַצַּדִּ֔יק וָאֹמַ֛ר רָזִי־לִ֥י רָֽזִי־לִ֖י א֣וֹי לִ֑י בֹּגְדִ֣ים בָּגָ֔דוּ וּבֶ֥גֶד בּוֹגְדִ֖ים בָּגָֽדוּ׃
verses.king_james: From the uttermost part of the earth have we heard songs, even glory to the righteous. But I said, My leanness, my leanness, woe unto me! the treacherous dealers have dealt treacherously; yea, the treacherous dealers have dealt very treacherously.

verses.latin_vulgate: Formido, et fovea, et laqueus  super te, qui habitator es terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פַּ֥חַד וָפַ֖חַת וָפָ֑ח עָלֶ֖יךָ יוֹשֵׁ֥ב הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Fear, and the pit, and the snare, are upon thee, O inhabitant of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit : qui fugerit a voce formidinis cadet in foveam ;  et qui se explicaverit de fovea tenebitur laqueo ;  quia cataractæ de excelsis apertæ sunt  et concutientur fundamenta terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֠הָיָ֠ה הַנָּ֞ס מִקּ֤וֹל הַפַּ֙חַד֙ יִפֹּ֣ל אֶל־הַפַּ֔חַת וְהָֽעוֹלֶה֙ מִתּ֣וֹךְ הַפַּ֔חַת יִלָּכֵ֖ד בַּפָּ֑ח כִּֽי־אֲרֻבּ֤וֹת מִמָּרוֹם֙ נִפְתָּ֔חוּ וַֽיִּרְעֲשׁ֖וּ מ֥וֹסְדֵי אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass, that he who fleeth from the noise of the fear shall fall into the pit; and he that cometh up out of the midst of the pit shall be taken in the snare: for the windows from on high are open, and the foundations of the earth do shake.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confractione confringetur terra,  contritione conteretur terra,  commotione commovebitur terra ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רֹ֥עָה הִֽתְרֹעֲעָ֖ה הָאָ֑רֶץ פּ֤וֹר הִֽתְפּוֹרְרָה֙ אֶ֔רֶץ מ֥וֹט הִֽתְמוֹטְטָ֖ה אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: The earth is utterly broken down, the earth is clean dissolved, the earth is moved exceedingly.

verses.latin_vulgate: agitatione agitabitur terra sicut ebrius,  et auferetur quasi tabernaculum unius noctis ;  et gravabit eam iniquitas sua,  et corruet, et non adjiciet ut resurgat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נ֣וֹעַ תָּנ֤וּעַ אֶ֙רֶץ֙ כַּשִּׁכּ֔וֹר וְהִֽתְנוֹדְדָ֖ה כַּמְּלוּנָ֑ה וְכָבַ֤ד עָלֶ֙יהָ֙ פִּשְׁעָ֔הּ וְנָפְלָ֖ה וְלֹא־תֹסִ֥יף קֽוּם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The earth shall reel to and fro like a drunkard, and shall be removed like a cottage; and the transgression thereof shall be heavy upon it; and it shall fall, and not rise again.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit : in die illa visitabit Dominus  super militiam cæli in excelso,  et super reges terræ qui sunt super terram ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָה֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֔וּא יִפְקֹ֧ד יְהֹוָ֛ה עַל־צְבָ֥א הַמָּר֖וֹם בַּמָּר֑וֹם וְעַל־מַלְכֵ֥י הָאֲדָמָ֖ה עַל־הָאֲדָמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in that day, that the Lord shall punish the host of the high ones that are on high, and the kings of the earth upon the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: et congregabuntur in congregatione unius fascis in lacum,  et claudentur ibi in carcere,  et post multos dies visitabuntur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֻסְּפ֨וּ אֲסֵפָ֤ה אַסִּיר֙ עַל־בּ֔וֹר וְסֻגְּר֖וּ עַל־מַסְגֵּ֑ר וּמֵרֹ֥ב יָמִ֖ים יִפָּקֵֽדוּ׃
verses.king_james: And they shall be gathered together, as prisoners are gathered in the pit, and shall be shut up in the prison, and after many days shall they be visited.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erubescet luna, et confundetur sol,  cum regnaverit Dominus exercituum  in monte Sion et in Jerusalem  et in conspectu senum suorum fuerit glorificatus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחָֽפְרָה֙ הַלְּבָנָ֔ה וּבוֹשָׁ֖ה הַחַמָּ֑ה כִּֽי־מָלַ֞ךְ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֗וֹת בְּהַ֤ר צִיּוֹן֙ וּבִיר֣וּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם וְנֶ֥גֶד זְקֵנָ֖יו כָּבֽוֹד׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Then the moon shall be confounded, and the sun ashamed, when the Lord of hosts shall reign in mount Zion, and in Jerusalem, and before his ancients gloriously.
